title: Cave Lamps
description: Adds the cave lamp; a utility light source block designed for caving.
body:
# Cave Lamps

This mod add the "Cave Lamp" block. A light source designed for caving. It can be placed on the floor, on walls, and hanging from the ceiling.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_72625db6-1202-4e3e-8e06-604163fea2da.png)

It can also be placed underwater, but not in flowing water.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e1fb9ec6-0cc9-4d8a-a3f9-5243dcbe7f23.png)

It is crafted with coal, a copper ingot, and an amethyst shard.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fc8261ee-7e23-4e1e-91d6-534f4e479e6d.png)
